title: FIN Bridge Hello
description: The boot handshake on POST /fin/v1/hello. The agent announces identity and versions; the server accepts (and returns the timing contract) or refuses on protocol skew with PROTOCOL_VERSION_MISMATCH (HTTP 426).

capabilities.title: Capabilities
capabilities.description: Optional list of capability tags the agent supports (e.g. discover, read, write, events). Advisory in protocol v1; reserved for capability negotiation at v2.

oneOf.title: Hello Response
oneOf.description: Server -> agent acceptance, carrying the timing contract so the agent need not hard-code it. Refusals (e.g. protocol skew) are not this shape; they are typed error responses (HTTP 426).

sessionAccepted.title: Session Accepted
sessionAccepted.description: True when the server registered the agent and marked it alive.

serverHoldMs.title: Server Hold (ms)
serverHoldMs.description: How long the server will hold a long-poll open before returning (default 25000). Must be shorter than the agent's InternetCard request timeout.

agentLivenessMs.title: Agent Liveness Window (ms)
agentLivenessMs.description: Window within which a hello/poll must arrive for the agent to count as alive (default 40000). Commands enqueued against a non-alive agent fail fast with AGENT_OFFLINE.
